name: github-status
description: Auto-generated GitHub profile stats cards — languages, contributions, and top repos. Runs daily via GitHub Actions.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/env.js && node --check src/github.js && node --check src/http.js && node --check src/stats.js && node --check src/render/cards.js && node --check src/render/gif.js && node --check src/render/svg.js
